title: Sections Maximum
description: An instance of a course with all properties fully resolved.

id.title: ID
id.description: A globally unique identifier of a section maximum to be used in all external references.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of a section.

startOn.title: Offering Start Date
startOn.description: The starting date at which a section may be scheduled to be taken.

endOn.title: Offering End Date
endOn.description: The ending date at which a section may no longer be scheduled to be taken.

code.title: Section Code
code.description: The human-readable identifier of a section. It is generally unique within an academic period.

number.title: Section Number
number.description: A numbering scheme or other mark that distinguishes between multiple sections. It is generally unique within an academic period and course.

instructionalPlatform.title: Instructional Platform
instructionalPlatform.description: The technology platform used to manage the administration of a section

code.title: Code
code.description: Human-readable code that identifies a technology platform.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of a technology platform.

detail.title: Instructional Platform
detail.description: The instructional platform used in this section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Platform.

academicPeriod.title: Academic Period
academicPeriod.description: The academic time period associated with this section.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that identifies an academic time period.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of an academic time period (for example, 'Fall 2014').

startOn.title: Period Start Date
startOn.description: The date at which the academic time period begins

endOn.title: Period End Date
endOn.description: The date at which the academic time period ends

censusDates.title: Census Dates
censusDates.description: The default dates at which section enrollment/headcount is determined for the academic period.

category.title: Category
category.description: A category for the academic period.

oneOf.title: Term
oneOf.description: A term within an academic year (for example, Semester).

type.title: Type
type.description: A type of period within an academic year.

parent.title: Parent
parent.description: The academic period or year in which a term occurs.

oneOf.title: Academic Period
oneOf.description: The academic period in which a term occurs.

academicPeriod.title: Academic Period
academicPeriod.description: The academic period in which a term occurs.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period.

oneOf.title: Academic Year
oneOf.description: The academic year in which a term occurs.

academicYear.title: Academic Year
academicYear.description: The academic year in which a term occurs.

preceding.title: Preceding
preceding.description: The term that immediately precedes the current academic term.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Preceding.

oneOf.title: Subterm
oneOf.description: A subterm within an academic term (for example, Part of a Semester).

type.title: Type
type.description: A type of period within a term.

parent.title: Parent
parent.description: The term in which the current subterm occurs.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Parent.

preceding.title: Preceding
preceding.description: The subterm that immediately precedes the current subterm.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Preceding.

sectionDateOverride.title: Section Date Override
sectionDateOverride.description: An indicator as to whether section date override has been disabled.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The academic period used in this section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

reportingAcademicPeriod.title: Reporting Academic Period
reportingAcademicPeriod.description: The reporting academic period associated with a section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Reporting Academic Period.

scheduleAcademicPeriod.title: Schedule Academic Period
scheduleAcademicPeriod.description: The schedule academic period associated with a section.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that identifies a schedule academic period.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the schedule academic period.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The schedule academic period used in this section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

censusDates.title: Census Dates
censusDates.description: The dates at which the section's enrollment/headcount is determined.

course.title: Course
course.description: The smallest unit of instruction for which an Organization grants credits.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of course title (e.g. short title, long title).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Type.

value.title: Value
value.description: The title for the course associated with the type.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: A topic or category used to categorize a branch of knowledge or study such as "Mathematics" or "Biology".

abbreviation.title: Abbreviation
abbreviation.description: Human-readable abbreviated name of the subject.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of a subject.

detail.title: Subject
detail.description: The subject associated with this course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Subject.

number.title: Course Number
number.description: A numbering scheme that distinguishes courses within a subject. Typically, this is an integer.

detail.title: Course
detail.description: The course associated with this section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Course.

credits.title: Credits
credits.description: Unit specification that can be awarded for completing a section.

code.title: Code
code.description: A human-readable reference code to identify a particular credit category.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of a credit category.

creditType.title: Credit Type
creditType.description: The higher-level category of academic credits.

detail.title: Credit Category
detail.description: The category of credit earned in this section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Credit Category.

measure.title: Unit of Measure
measure.description: A unit or standard of measurement.

minimum.title: Minimum number
minimum.description: The lower number, inclusive bound of a numeric range of values.

maximum.title: Maximum number
maximum.description: The upper, inclusive bound of a numeric range of values.

increment.title: Increment number
increment.description: The multiple by which a numeric range of values can be stepped from the minimum to the maximum. For example, a range of 1 to 3 with an increment of 1 would evaluate to 1, 2, or 3. Specifying an increment of 0.5 would evaluate to 1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, or 3

site.title: Site
site.description: The primary location within the organization where a section's meetings will be held

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that identifies the site.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the site.

detail.title: Site
detail.description: The site where this section's events will be held.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Site.

academicLevels.title: Academic Levels
academicLevels.description: The levels of academic progress that can be associated with a section

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that identifies an academic level (for example, 'UG').

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of an academic level (for example, 'Undergraduate').

detail.title: Academic Level
detail.description: The academic level associated with this section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

gradeSchemes.title: Grade Schemes
gradeSchemes.description: The grading schemes that may be used to award a grade to a student in this section of the course. Must be a subset of the grade schemes of the course.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code for the grade scheme that may be used a reference or for reporting.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of a grade scheme.

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: A designation of the level of instruction of a course or a program of study.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that identifies the academic level (e.g. 'UG').

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the academic level (e.g. 'Undergraduate').

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: A designation of the level of instruction of a course or a program of study.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

gradeMode.title: Grade Mode
gradeMode.description: The grade mode associated with the grade scheme.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code associated with the grade mode.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the grade modes.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The grade mode associated with the grade scheme.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

startOn.title: Start Date
startOn.description: The date after which a grade scheme may be used.

endOn.title: End Date
endOn.description: The date after which a grade scheme may no longer be used.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The scheme to which the grade belongs, such as pass/fail, etc.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that identifies a course level that is usually assigned based on institution conventions.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of a course level.

detail.title: Course Level
detail.description: The course level associated with this section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Course Level.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of a section (for example, open, closed, pending, cancelled).

category.title: Category
category.description: The category of the section status.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: A custom section status.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: The scheme for calculating the duration of a section

length.title: Length
length.description: The duration length, expressed in duration units

unit.title: Unit
unit.description: The calendar period of time equivalent to 1 unit of duration

maxEnrollment.title: Maximum Enrollment
maxEnrollment.description: The maximum number of persons who are allowed to enroll for a section.

instructionalMethodDetails.title: Instructional Method Details
instructionalMethodDetails.description: The method, style, or format in which the section of a course is taught (for example, 'Lecture', 'Lab').

items.title: Instructional Method Details
items.description: The method, style, or format in which the section of a course is taught (for example, 'Lecture', 'Lab').

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Method Details.

hours.title: Hours
hours.description: The hours that may be assigned to the section by instructional method.

administrativeInstructionalMethod.title: Administrative Instructional Method
administrativeInstructionalMethod.description: The method, style, or format for which hours are established for a section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Administrative Instructional Method.

minimum.title: Minimum
minimum.description: The minimum number of hours that may be established for an instructional method.

maximum.title: Maximum
maximum.description: The maximum number of hours that may be established for an instructional method.

increment.title: Increment
increment.description: The increment specified for the hours.

interval.title: Interval
interval.description: The interval specified for the hours.

instructionalEvents.title: Instructional Events
instructionalEvents.description: The instructional activities that take place during a section.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of an instructional activity that takes place during a section.

instructionalMethod.title: Instructional Method
instructionalMethod.description: The method, style, or format of instruction associated with the instructor's involvement with the section (for example, 'Lecture', 'Lab').

abbreviation.title: Abbreviation
abbreviation.description: The abbreviated name of an instructional method.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of an instructional method.

detail.title: Instructional Method
detail.description: The instructional method used in this instructional event.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Method.

recurrence.title: Recurrence
recurrence.description: The recurring meeting time pattern associated with the instructional event.

timePeriod.title: Time Period
timePeriod.description: The period of time to be repeated.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The beginning of the time period being repeated.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The end of the time period being repeated.

repeatRule.title: Repeat Rule
repeatRule.description: The rule that describes how to repeat the time period.

oneOf.title: Daily
oneOf.description: Rules for repeating on a daily basis.

interval.title: Interval
interval.description: Number of days between each repetition.

ends.title: Ends
ends.description: When to end the daily repetitions.

repetitions.title: Repetitions
repetitions.description: Number of times to repeat, then stop.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date after which to stop repeating.

oneOf.title: Weekly
oneOf.description: Rules for repeating on a weekly basis.

interval.title: Interval
interval.description: Number of weeks between each repetition.

daysOfWeek.title: Days of Week
daysOfWeek.description: The days of the week on which to repeat the event.

ends.title: Ends
ends.description: When to end the weekly repetitions.

repetitions.title: Repetitions
repetitions.description: Number of times to repeat, then stop.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date after which to stop repeating.

oneOf.title: Monthly
oneOf.description: Rules for repeating on a monthly basis.

interval.title: Interval
interval.description: Number of months between each repetition.

repeatBy.title: Repeat By
repeatBy.description: How to calculate the day of the month on which to start repeating.

dayOfMonth.title: Day of Month
dayOfMonth.description: The number of the day in the month on which to repeat. Use a positive number to count from the start of the month (e.g., 1 = first day of the month, 2 = second day of the month), and a negative number to count from the end of the month (e.g. -1 = last day of the month, -2 = second to last day of the month, etc.).

dayOfWeek.title: Day of Week
dayOfWeek.description: The cardinal day of the week (e.g., the first Tuesday, the last Friday, etc.) in the month on which to start repeating.

occurrence.title: Occurrence
occurrence.description: The nth occurrence of the day of the week in the month. Use a positive number to count from the start of the month (e.g., 1 = first in the month, 2 = second in the month), and a negative number to count from the end of the month (e.g. -1 = last in the month, -2 = second from last, etc.).

ends.title: Ends
ends.description: When to end the monthly repetitions.

repetitions.title: Repetitions
repetitions.description: Number of times to repeat, then stop.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date after which to stop repeating.

oneOf.title: Yearly
oneOf.description: Rules for repeating on an annual basis.

interval.title: Interval
interval.description: Number of years between each repetition.

ends.title: Ends
ends.description: When to end the yearly repetitions.

repetitions.title: Repetitions
repetitions.description: Number of times to repeat, then stop.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date after which to stop repeating.

workLoad.title: Work Load
workLoad.description: The amount of work involved in teaching a section.

locations.title: Location
locations.description: Locations where the instructional event will take place.

location.title: Location
location.description: The location where the instructional event takes place.

oneOf.title: Site
oneOf.description: A physical location within the organization.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that identifies the site.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the site.

detail.title: Site
detail.description: The site where the event will take place.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Site.

oneOf.title: Room
oneOf.description: A room within a building, on a floor.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of a room.

number.title: Number
number.description: A numbering scheme to distinguish different buildings, floors, and rooms located in the same site.  Typically this is a string.

floor.title: Floor
floor.description: The name of the floor where a room is located.

building.title: building
building.description: A physical structure, usually containing rooms, which is located at a specified physical location.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of a building.

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that identifies the building.

detail.title: building
detail.description: The building used in this instructional event.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the building.

detail.title: Room
detail.description: The room where the event will take place.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Room.

oneOf.title: Online Location
oneOf.description: A meeting location available via a computer network, such as an online video conference.

phoneNumber.title: Phone
phoneNumber.description: The international telephone number of the location.

phoneExtension.title: Extension
phoneExtension.description: The telephone extension number of the location's telephone.

webAddress.title: Web Address
webAddress.description: The primary web address (URL) of the online meeting location.

oneOf.title: Other Location
oneOf.description: A human readable description of a location.

title.title: Title
title.description: The user provided description of a non-standard location for the instructional event.

detail.title: Instructional Event
detail.description: The instructional event associated to this section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Event.

instructorRosterDetails.title: Instructor Roster Details
instructorRosterDetails.description: Details for the persons assigned to teach a section.

instructor.title: Instructor
instructor.description: A person assigned to teach a section.

names.title: Names
names.description: The names associated with a person, specified by type (for example, "legal" or "birth").

type.title: Name Type
type.description: The type of a person's name being defined. For example, a "Primary" name.

category.title: Name Type Category
category.description: The global category of person name types.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Additional details associated with the name type.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

preference.title: Name Preference
preference.description: Indicates the preferred name for the person. Only one name should be set to preferred for a person.

title.title: Title
title.description: The person's title. For example, "Mr.", "Mrs.", or "Dr.".

firstName.title: First Name
firstName.description: The person's first, or given, name.

lastNamePrefix.title: Last Name Prefix
lastNamePrefix.description: The article or preposition portion of a person's last name. For example, "De la", "Van", or "Van der Von".

lastName.title: Last Name
lastName.description: The person's last, or family, name.

pedigree.title: Pedigree/Suffix
pedigree.description: The person's pedigree. For example, "Jr." or "Sr.".

professionalAbbreviations.title: Professional Abbreviation
professionalAbbreviations.description: A post-nominal professional abbreviation, reflecting an earned degree or honor. For example, "M.D." or "Ph.D.".

credentials.title: Credential
credentials.description: The unique information that identifies a user to a system such as a network or computer.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of credential, such as "Person ID", "System ID", etc.

value.title: Credential
value.description: The credential used in this section.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The date when the credential starts being valid.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The date when the credential stops being valid.

detail.title: Instructor
detail.description: The instructor teaching this section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructor.

instructorRole.title: Instructor Role
instructorRole.description: The role of the instructor (e.g. primary).

workLoad.title: Work Load
workLoad.description: The amount of work involved in teaching the section that is attributable to the instructor.

responsibilityPercentage.title: Responsibility Percentage
responsibilityPercentage.description: The rate or proportion per hundred of the responsibility for managing the instructional activities that is attributable to the instructor.

workStartOn.title: Work Start Date
workStartOn.description: The date when an instructor is assigned to start teaching the scheduled event for a section.

workEndOn.title: Work End Date
workEndOn.description: The date after which an instructor is no longer assigned to the scheduled event for a section.

instructionalEvents.title: Instructional Events
instructionalEvents.description: The instructional events associated with the assignment of the instructor to the section, if applicable.

items.title: Instructional Events
items.description: The instructional events associated with the assignment of the instructor to the section, if applicable.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Events.

instructionalMethods.title: Instructional Methods
instructionalMethods.description: The methods, styles, or formats of instruction associated with the instructor's involvement with the section (e.g. lecture, lab, etc.).

items.title: Instructional Methods
items.description: The methods, styles, or formats of instruction associated with the instructor's involvement with the section (e.g. lecture, lab, etc.).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Methods.

owningInstitutionUnits.title: Owning Institution Units
owningInstitutionUnits.description: Units (departments) of the educational institution that own, or are responsible for, the course.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that identifies the unit.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the unit.

ownershipPercentage.title: Percent Ownership
ownershipPercentage.description: The rate or proportion per hundred of ownership that is attributable to the unit.

institutionUnit.title: Institution Unit
institutionUnit.description: The unit (department) primarily responsible for this section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Institution Unit.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of the unit (e.g., school, division, department, etc.).

gradeTypes.title: Grade Types
gradeTypes.description: The grade types that can be used in grading a section

title.description: The full name of grade type

details.title: Grade Type
details.description: The grade type that is used in this section

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Grade Type.

chargeAssessmentMethod.title: Charge Assessment Method
chargeAssessmentMethod.description: The method used to assess the charge for the section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Charge Assessment Method.

alternateIds.title: Alternate Ids
alternateIds.description: Additional unique identifiers assigned to sections to support non-Ethos integrations.

title.description: The title of the alternate identifier.

value.title: Value
